title: Enforcement
doc_html:
§1807.3. Enforcement

            A. The commissioner may take any actions necessary or appropriate to enforce the provisions of this Part and the commissioner's regulations. The commissioner may order a person to cease and desist from committing violations of this Part or the commissioner's regulations, issue an order prohibiting a person from acting as an appraiser or umpire, and rescind the registration of any person who violates this Part or the commissioner's regulations or orders.

            B. A person aggrieved by a decision, act, or order of the commissioner pursuant to the provisions of this Part may demand a hearing in accordance with Chapter 12 of this Title, R.S. 22:2191 et seq.

            Acts 2012, No. 96, §1; Acts 2024, No. 625, §1.

§1807.3.  Enforcement
A.  The commissioner may take any actions necessary or appropriate to enforce the
provisions of this Part and the commissioner's regulations.  The commissioner may order a
person to cease and desist from committing violations of this Part or the commissioner's
regulations, issue an order prohibiting a person from acting as an appraiser or umpire, and
rescind the registration of any person who violates this Part or the commissioner's regulations
or orders.
B.  A person aggrieved by a decision, act, or order of the commissioner pursuant to
the provisions of this Part may demand a hearing in accordance with Chapter 12 of this Title,
R.S. 22:2191 et seq.
Acts 2012, No. 96, §1; Acts 2024, No. 625, §1.
